# `x-localip`

Display local IP addresses


- **Usage**: `x-localip [FLAGS] [interface]`

## Arguments

### `[interface]`

Specific network interface

## Flags

### `--help`

Show help

### `--version`

Show version

### `--ipv4`

Show only IPv4 addresses

### `--ipv6`

Show only IPv6 addresses
